data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for fraud detection (self-referral, fake accounts) but did not provide concrete evidence that this requirement is fully satisfied. While the linked use case mentions that the fraud system flags suspicious self-referral patterns and blocks them, it lacks detailed evidence of how this detection is implemented and whether it effectively prevents fraudulent activities. Therefore, there is a gap in the evidence regarding the complete coverage of the fraud detection requirement.
gaps: Insufficient evidence of the effectiveness of the fraud detection system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
